-- Insert test user for cleanup durability scenarios
INSERT INTO users \(id, email, \\"passwordHash\\", role, \\"customerAccessStatus\\", \\"accountStatus\\", \\"createdAt\\", \\"updatedAt\\"\)
VALUES \('cleanup-test-user', 'cleanup-test@aldaro.ai', 'hash', 'CUSTOMER', 'APPROVED', 'ACTIVE', NOW\(\), NOW\(\)\)
ON CONFLICT \(id\) DO NOTHING;

-- Scenario 1: Stale CREATING workspace \(>15 min old\)
INSERT INTO workspaces \(id, \\"gpuType\\", region, status, \\"isWarmPool\\", \\"createdAt\\", \\"updatedAt\\"\)
VALUES \('ws-stale-creating', 'rtx-5090', 'cleanup-test', 'CREATING', true, NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '20 minutes', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '20 minutes'\)
ON CONFLICT \(id\) DO NOTHING;

-- Scenario 2: Stale TERMINATING workspace \(>10 min old, no cleanup job\)
INSERT INTO workspaces \(id, \\"assignedUserId\\", \\"gpuType\\", region, status, \\"createdAt\\", \\"updatedAt\\"\)
VALUES \('ws-stale-terminating', 'cleanup-test-user', 'rtx-5090', 'cleanup-test', 'TERMINATING', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '15 minutes', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '15 minutes'\)
ON CONFLICT \(id\) DO NOTHING;

-- Scenario 3: TERMINATING workspace with a RUNNING session
INSERT INTO workspaces \(id, \\"assignedUserId\\", \\"gpuType\\", region, status, \\"createdAt\\", \\"updatedAt\\"\)
VALUES \('ws-terminating-session', 'cleanup-test-user', 'rtx-5090', 'cleanup-test', 'TERMINATING', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '5 minutes', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '5 minutes'\)
ON CONFLICT \(id\) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO usage_sessions \(id, \\"userId\\", \\"workspaceId\\", \\"gpuType\\", \\"startTime\\", status, \\"pricePerHourCents\\", \\"createdAt\\", \\"updatedAt\\"\)
VALUES \('session-on-terminating', 'cleanup-test-user', 'ws-terminating-session', 'rtx-5090', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '2 hours', 'RUNNING', 150, NOW\(\), NOW\(\)\)
ON CONFLICT \(id\) DO NOTHING;

-- Scenario 4: TERMINATED workspace with unreleased endpoint \(orphan\)
INSERT INTO workspaces \(id, \\"assignedUserId\\", \\"gpuType\\", region, status, \\"terminatedAt\\", \\"createdAt\\", \\"updatedAt\\"\)
VALUES \('ws-terminated-orphan-ep', 'cleanup-test-user', 'rtx-5090', 'cleanup-test', 'TERMINATED', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '1 hour', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '2 hours', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '1 hour'\)
ON CONFLICT \(id\) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO workspace_endpoints \(id, \\"workspaceId\\", \\"gatewayHost\\", \\"sshPort\\", \\"jupyterPort\\", \\"vscodePort\\", \\"createdAt\\", \\"updatedAt\\"\)
VALUES \('ep-orphan', 'ws-terminated-orphan-ep', 'gw1.aldaro.ai', 29001, 29002, 29003, NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '2 hours', NOW\(\)\)
ON CONFLICT \(id\) DO NOTHING;
" 2>&1)
